value_chain_position: Network and OT security platform — sells FortiGate firewalls plus SASE/SD-WAN modules; the firewall/network-edge toll-taker for hybrid enterprise and OT environments that underpin AI-connected infrastructure.
relative_comps: FTNT is the highest FCF-margin name in the cohort (34%) with $7.1B TTM revenue and 16% YoY growth — more utility-like than CRWD/PANW but extremely cash-generative. Its hardware-plus-SaaS model creates durable renewal streams but limits upside growth vs. pure-cloud peers. In OT/industrial security and SMB, FTNT is a near-chokepoint; in enterprise cloud-native security it is losing wallet share to PANW/CRWD. The multiple (~14x revenue) reflects this slower-growth positioning. Attractive for value-oriented disruption exposure but not the highest-conviction growth play.
